Home.review1_text: I was hesitant about paying with USDT, but the process was flawless. My parents in Tehran received the pistachio box in 24 hours. Will order again!
Home.review2_text: Finally a service that solves the banking sanction issue! Sent a beautiful flower basket to my wife in Shiraz using Solana. The delivery guy was very respectful.
Home.review3_text: The support is 10/10. I made a mistake in the address, contacted them on WhatsApp, and they fixed it instantly. The Saffron quality was top-notch.

CurrencyBanner.title: Currency Rate Transparency Board

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: Find your answer here, or contact our WhatsApp support if you need help.

items.q1: Will the recipient see the price?
items.a1: No. We do not include any invoice inside the package. It is delivered exactly like a personal gift from you.
items.q2: Why can't I pay with Visa/Mastercard?
items.a2: Due to international banking sanctions, global payment gateways do not service Iran. To operate and deliver goods within Iran, we use the borderless Crypto payment system.
items.q3: Is paying with Crypto difficult? I haven't done it before.
items.a3: Not at all! The entire process takes less than 3 minutes. Just install a wallet (like Trust Wallet) and buy Tether from a reputable exchange inside it. A visual guide is available in our site menu.
items.q4: Is the quality of nuts and edibles guaranteed?
items.a4: Yes. We contract directly with top-tier gardeners and producers. If the recipient is unhappy with the quality or freshness, we will take the package back and refund the money.
items.a5: Tehran: 24 to 48 hours. Provincial centers: 3 to 4 business days. Small towns: up to 5 business days.
items.q6: What happens if the package doesn't reach my family?
items.a6: We offer a 100% Money-Back Guarantee. If the package is lost or damaged, the choice is yours: we either refund the money or resend the package for free.
items.q7: How much is the shipping cost to Iran?
items.a7: Completely free! All prices on the site include the product cost + gift packaging + postal delivery.
items.q8: How are currency exchange rates (EUR/GBP) calculated?
items.a8: Our base prices are in USD. The system automatically converts the price to your selected currency using real-time global market rates. There are no hidden fees.
items.q9: Can I write a message on the gift?
items.a9: Yes! At Checkout, there is a note box. We will print your text on a beautiful postcard and place it on the gift.
items.q10: Do you coordinate with the recipient before delivery?
items.a10: Yes. Our distribution team calls the recipient's number before heading out to ensure they are at home.
items.q11: Can I reserve an order for a specific day (e.g., a birthday)?
items.a11: Yes. Just write the exact date in the order notes. We plan the shipment so it arrives on that day (or the nearest business day).
items.a12: Currently we only accept Tether (USDT) and Solana (SOL) through the Solana (SPL) network. Please make sure your deposit is sent via the Solana network — sending from other networks such as TRC20 or ERC20 will result in permanent loss of funds.
items.q13: What if the recipient is not home?
items.a13: Our courier makes up to 2 free delivery attempts. If still unsuccessful, we will contact you or the recipient to arrange another time.
items.q14: Is my and the recipient's information confidential?
items.a14: 100%. Your information is used only for order processing and will not be published or shared anywhere else.
items.q15: How can I track my order status?
items.a15: After purchase, you receive an Order ID. By entering it on the 'Track Order' page, you can see the package status moment by moment.
items.q16: Is it possible to customize packages?
items.a16: Yes. If you have a specific product in mind that is not on the site, message us on WhatsApp, and we will procure it for you.
items.a17: Our online support (WhatsApp/Telegram) is active from 9 AM to 12 AM (Iran time).
items.q18: Do you deliver on official Iranian holidays?
items.a18: No, the post office and couriers are closed on official holidays, but placing orders on the site is possible 24/7.
items.q19: Are there customs limits for sending Saffron?
items.a19: Since the shipping is done domestically (from inside Iran to inside Iran), there are absolutely no customs limitations.
items.q20: What if the payment failed but money was deducted?
items.a20: Don't worry. Send the Transaction Hash (TXID) to us on WhatsApp. We will check it manually and confirm the order.
items.q21: Can I send money, a gift, or a souvenir to Iran using cryptocurrency?
items.a21: Yes, absolutely. Soughat Shop lets you pay directly on our website with Tether (USDT) and Solana (SOL). If you'd like to pay with another cryptocurrency, such as Bitcoin or any other coin, that's no problem either — just reach out to our online support (WhatsApp or Telegram) and we'll arrange a secure manual payment for you. This way, without needing a bank card and without being blocked by sanctions, you can send money, a gift, or a souvenir to your loved ones in Tehran, Mashhad, Isfahan, Shiraz, Tabriz, and anywhere across Iran.

Product.crypto_guarantee_desc: Your crypto payment is held securely. If the gift is not delivered to your family in Iran, the full amount will be refunded directly to your wallet.

ProductsPage.title: Iranian Souvenirs & Gifts, Delivered in Iran

ProductsPage.empty_desc: Try adjusting your search or filter to find what you are looking for.

ProductsSEO.banner_alt: Send gifts, souvenirs and money transfers to Iran with crypto payment
ProductsSEO.banner_subtitle: From cash and gold to sweets, handicrafts and flowers — pay with crypto and reach your loved ones anywhere in Iran.
ProductsSEO.intro_title: Every Gift Tells Your Family You're Thinking of Them
ProductsSEO.intro_p1: From saffron-scented sweets, roasted pistachios and handcrafted jewelry to gold coins, smart gadgets and fresh flowers, every product in our catalog is chosen with one goal in mind: making your family in Iran feel your presence, even from thousands of miles away. Browse by category, compare prices, and pick exactly what suits the occasion — a birthday, Nowruz, or simply an "I miss you."
ProductsSEO.intro_p2: Ordering is refreshingly simple. Add the recipient's details, place your order, and we'll give you a payment wallet address. Send the amount from your crypto exchange or personal wallet — any cryptocurrency works, though we recommend Tether (USDT) or Solana (SOL) on the Solana network for their very low transaction fees. As soon as your payment is confirmed on-chain, your order is confirmed in our system and moves straight to processing.
ProductsSEO.intro_p3: There's no single warehouse that every order passes through — how we fulfill your order depends on what you're sending. Cash and gold go straight to the recipient's bank account, flowers are arranged through our partner florists, and other products are sourced as close to the recipient as possible. Here's exactly how each one works:
ProductsSEO.fulfillment_title: How Your Gift Is Prepared & Delivered
ProductsSEO.fulfillment_subtitle: The way we handle your order depends on what you send. Here's the full picture, with nothing hidden.
ProductsSEO.fulfillment_cash_desc: For cash or gold orders, we collect the recipient's card and account number and transfer the amount directly to their bank account as soon as your order is confirmed — fast, with no middleman and no need for the recipient to go anywhere.
ProductsSEO.fulfillment_goods_desc: For most products, we source your order from the closest trusted store to the recipient's address, so it arrives fresh and quickly. If the recipient lives in a smaller town without good retailers nearby, we purchase and carefully package the item in Tehran and ship it nationwide by reliable courier or post.
ProductsSEO.fulfillment_flowers_desc: Flower orders are placed with one of our partner florists in the city closest to the recipient. The arrangement is prepared fresh and sent directly to the recipient's address.
ProductsSEO.fulfillment_tehran_desc: If the recipient is in Tehran or Karaj, delivery is even faster and easier through our partner florists and vendors in these two cities, with a courier bringing the gift straight to their door.
ProductsSEO.fulfillment_date_desc: Ordering for a birthday or anniversary? Just add your preferred delivery date in the order notes, and we'll time the purchase and delivery so the gift arrives exactly when you want it to.
ProductsSEO.faq_title: Frequently Asked Questions About Sending Gifts to Iran
ProductsSEO.faq_subtitle: Quick answers about payment, order fulfillment, and delivery at Soughat Shop.
ProductsSEO.faq_q1: How can I send a gift to my family in Iran from abroad?
ProductsSEO.faq_a1: Simply choose a product from any of our categories — cash and gold, sweets and nuts, flowers, handicrafts, digital goods, and more — enter the recipient's address in Iran, and pay with cryptocurrency. We take care of everything from sourcing to doorstep delivery.
ProductsSEO.faq_a2: Once you place an order, we give you a payment wallet address. You send the order amount from your crypto exchange or personal wallet to that address. As soon as the transaction is confirmed on the network, your order moves into processing — no Iranian bank account or international wire transfer required.
ProductsSEO.faq_q3: Which cryptocurrencies can I pay with?
ProductsSEO.faq_a3: You can pay with any cryptocurrency you're comfortable with — there's no restriction. That said, we recommend Tether (USDT) or Solana (SOL) on the Solana network, since their transaction fees are very low, meaning more of your payment goes toward the actual gift.
ProductsSEO.faq_q4: Does every order go through one warehouse in Tehran?
ProductsSEO.faq_a4: No — we don't route every order through a single central warehouse. How we fulfill an order depends on what you're sending: cash orders are transferred directly to the recipient's bank account, flowers go through a partner florist in the city closest to the recipient, and other products are purchased from the nearest trusted store to the recipient whenever possible. We only source from Tehran and ship by post when there isn't a good local option in the recipient's city.
ProductsSEO.faq_q5: How does a cash or gold gift reach the recipient?
ProductsSEO.faq_a5: For these orders, we collect the recipient's card and account number, and once your order is confirmed, the amount is transferred directly to their bank account the same day — no need for them to go anywhere.
ProductsSEO.faq_q6: Do you deliver to smaller cities, not just Tehran?
ProductsSEO.faq_a6: Yes, we deliver nationwide. For major cities we usually source locally. If the recipient is in a smaller town without a good local supplier, we purchase and carefully package the item in Tehran and send it by reliable post or courier.
ProductsSEO.faq_q7: Can I schedule delivery for a specific date, like a birthday?
ProductsSEO.faq_a7: Absolutely. Just add your preferred delivery date in the order notes at checkout, and our team will time the purchase and delivery so the gift arrives exactly on that day.
ProductsSEO.faq_q8: Are the products genuine and good quality?
ProductsSEO.faq_a8: Yes. Whether sourced locally near the recipient or from Tehran, every item is purchased from trusted suppliers and checked for quality before it's dispatched.
ProductsSEO.faq_q9: How do I know my gift actually arrived?
ProductsSEO.faq_a9: As soon as the gift is delivered, we send you a photo or delivery confirmation on WhatsApp or Telegram, so you can relax knowing it reached your loved one safely.
ProductsSEO.faq_q10: What happens between payment and delivery?
ProductsSEO.faq_a10: After your crypto payment is confirmed, your order is verified in our system and moves into processing. Depending on the type of order — a bank transfer, a purchased and shipped product, or a flower arrangement — it's delivered as quickly as possible, or on the specific date you requested.

About.title: About Us | Sending Gifts to Iran

About.mission_text_1: For years, Iranians abroad faced huge problems sending money or gifts to Iran due to banking sanctions and delays.
About.mission_text_2: We decided to build a secure bridge using Crypto. You buy from anywhere in the world, and we deliver in Iran within 48 hours.

CryptoPayment.hint_title: Price Transparency: How was this amount calculated?
CryptoPayment.hint_loading: Calculating the exact amount based on the live rate...
CryptoPayment.hint_usdt: Dear customer, our system's base pricing is set in US Dollars ($). Since you selected {fiatName}, your invoice amount was first converted to USD using our live rate (<ltr>1 {fiatCode} ≈ {fiatRate}$</ltr>), which equals <ltr>{usdAmount}$</ltr>. Then, based on the fixed rate (<ltr>1 USDT = 1 USD</ltr>), your final payable amount is exactly <ltr>{cryptoAmount} USDT</ltr>.
CryptoPayment.hint_usdt_usd: Dear customer, our system's base pricing is set in US Dollars ($), and since you selected the same currency, no conversion is needed. Your invoice amount is exactly <ltr>{usdAmount}$</ltr>. Based on the fixed rate (<ltr>1 USDT = 1 USD</ltr>), your final payable amount is exactly <ltr>{cryptoAmount} USDT</ltr>.
CryptoPayment.hint_sol: Dear customer, our system's base pricing is set in US Dollars ($). Your invoice amount was converted to USD using our live rate, which equals <ltr>{usdAmount}$</ltr>. Since the current market rate for 1 Solana (SOL) is <ltr>{solRate}$</ltr>, your final payable amount is exactly <ltr>{cryptoAmount} SOL</ltr>.

CryptoGuide.title: Crypto Payment Guide
CryptoGuide.meta_desc: Step-by-step guide on how to pay with Tether (USDT) and Solana to send gifts to Iran.
CryptoGuide.hero_desc: Why can't we use credit cards, and how to pay with crypto in 3 minutes?
CryptoGuide.why_text_1: Due to international banking sanctions, Iran's banking system is not connected to the global network. Therefore, no online store operating inside Iran can directly use international payment gateways.
CryptoGuide.why_text_2: To solve this and bridge the gap, we use Blockchain technology (Cryptocurrency). This method not only bypasses sanctions securely but also has much lower fees than traditional exchanges.
CryptoGuide.step1_desc: Install a crypto wallet on your phone. We recommend 'Phantom Wallet' or 'Trust Wallet' for their simplicity and security.
CryptoGuide.step2_desc: Buy some Solana (SOL) or Tether (USDT). You can use exchanges like Coinbase or MoonPay directly within the wallet app.
CryptoGuide.step3_desc: At checkout, a QR Code will be displayed. Simply scan it with your wallet app and confirm the transaction. That's it!
CryptoGuide.security_desc: Yes, crypto payment is one of the most secure methods globally. No one accesses your bank account, and the transaction is recorded on the blockchain. We also offer a

HomeSEO.main_title: Soughat Shop: Reliable Gift Delivery to Iran Worldwide
HomeSEO.intro_text: Have you ever wanted to send a gift to your family in Iran for Mother's Day or New Year but faced blocked banking doors? Soughat Shop is born to solve this. We allow Iranians abroad to deliver the best souvenirs to their loved ones' doorstep in Iran using cryptocurrency, without needing Iranian bank cards.
HomeSEO.crypto_text: Due to banking sanctions, using Visa/Mastercard for direct purchases in Iran is impossible. We bypassed this with Blockchain. You can pay with Tether (USDT), Bitcoin (BTC), or Solana (SOL). This method is 100% secure and legal.
HomeSEO.guarantee_text: We know you are thousands of miles away and care about quality. All our products are sourced from top suppliers. If your order doesn't reach the recipient for any reason, we offer a 100% Money Back Guarantee.
HomeSEO.coverage_text: It doesn't matter which city your family lives in. Soughat Shop distribution network delivers your order via express post and private couriers:
HomeSEO.keywords: Keywords: Send money to Iran, Online shopping for family in Iran, Send birthday gift to Iran, Gift exchange, Buy Persian pistachio.
HomeSEO.global_title: Order From Anywhere In The World, Delivered Across Iran
HomeSEO.global_text: Whether you're in the United States, Canada, Europe, Australia, or any other country and city around the globe, placing an order and paying on Soughat Shop takes just a few clicks. No border, bank, or region limits you — all you need is an internet connection. On the other end, our team in Tehran processes your order and ships it to every city in Iran, including Tehran, Karaj, Mashhad, Isfahan, Shiraz, Tabriz, Rasht, Ahvaz, Sari, Kerman, and Yazd.
HomeSEO.fees_text: Unlike many exchanges and online intermediaries, Soughat Shop charges no extra fees on your payment — the amount you see is the final amount. Your transaction is confirmed quickly, so your order moves straight into processing.
HomeSEO.categories_title: Diverse Categories For Every Taste And Occasion
HomeSEO.categories_text: On Soughat Shop, pick exactly what you think your family or friend in Iran will love, from a wide range of categories:
HomeSEO.occasions_title: A Gift For Every Special Occasion
HomeSEO.occasions_text: Birthdays, Nowruz, Yalda Night, wedding anniversaries, Mother's Day, Father's Day, graduations, or simply missing home — whatever the occasion, Soughat Shop is here to help you show your loved ones in Iran that you're thinking of them, even from thousands of miles away.
HomeSEO.security_title: Security And Peace Of Mind At Every Step
HomeSEO.security_text: Your payments are processed through secure blockchain networks, and no sensitive banking information is ever exchanged. Once your order is delivered, we send you a photo or receipt via Telegram or WhatsApp, and our support team is available around the clock, in every time zone, whenever you need us.
HomeSEO.image_alt_1: Soughat Shop products ready to ship to Iran
HomeSEO.image_alt_2: Gift packaging by Soughat Shop ready for delivery to Iran

Trust.title: Why Trust Soughat Shop?
Trust.hero_title: Your Peace of Mind is Our Priority
Trust.hero_desc: We understand the anxiety of sending gifts remotely to Iran. Here is how we guarantee a perfect experience.
Trust.guarantee_desc: No questions asked. If the package doesn't arrive or is damaged, you get a full refund instantly.
Trust.quality_desc: We source from top-tier suppliers in Tehran. If your family isn't happy with the quality, we take it back.
Trust.privacy_desc: No price invoice is sent to the recipient. Your data and the recipient's details remain strictly confidential.
Trust.support_desc: We are not bots! Our support team is ready on WhatsApp to answer any concern you might have.
Trust.secure_desc: Blockchain is the most secure payment method globally. Your transaction is transparent and traceable.
Trust.cta_card_desc: Place your first order right now.
